issue_body: It would be great, if you can add support for Falcon models as well!  Does it support onnx models today?
pr_body:
Close #195 #197 #356

This PR replaces PR #321 

Also, revert an early all-reduce optimization that stores all all-reduce results in a shared buffer. This can lead to wrong results in distributed settings for models with two parallel all-reduce branches.

Correctness check:
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-rw-1b
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-rw-7b
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-7b
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-7b-instruct
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-40b
- [x] tiiuae/falcon-40b-instruct
